dataList.name: Staticky Two-way Radio
dataList.desc:
On Use with a Skill that gains or spends [Bullet]: Gain 1 [Agility] and 2 [AttackUp] next turn (once per turn per Identity)
- For Skills that inflict [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', deal +(20 / # of Coins)% damage

dataList.name: Beak-shaped Necklace
dataList.desc:
On Use with a Skill that gains or spends [Bullet]: Gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [Enhancement] next turn (once per turn per Identity)
- For Skills that inflict [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal +(20 / # of Coins)% damage

dataList.name: Desperado
dataList.desc:
This E.G.O Gift's effects are enhanced based on the number of Identities in the Team loadout with Attack Skills that gain or spend [Bullet] (except E.G.O Skills; counts all units in the Team)

- At 2+...
On Use with a Skill that gains or spends [Bullet]: Gain 2 [Agility] and 4 [AttackUp] next turn (once per Identity per turn)

- At 5+...
Skills used by Identities that gain or spend [Bullet]: Clash Power +1, deal +10% damage
Skills that gain or spend [Bullet]: Deal +(100 / # of Coins)% damage
If an affected unit is out of [Bullet], gain 4 [Bullet] at the next Turn Start (once per Identity per Encounter)

- At 8+...
Turn Start: Apply 1 [DesperadoBuff] to Identities that gain or spend [Bullet]
• If the affected unit did not spend [Bullet] last turn, apply 1 additional [DesperadoBuff]
Combat End: deal (total sum of [DesperadoBuff] on all allies x 3) Pierce damage to 1 random enemy (max 30)
• Then, repeat the above effect (number of Identities in the Team that gain or spend [Bullet] - 1) times

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain Clash Power and deal more damage
Inflict [DesperadoBuff]. Inflict additional [DesperadoBuff] when conditions are met
Deal Pierce damage to 1 random enemy

dataList.name: Harmonics
dataList.desc:
When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain 1 [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Reduce [Vulnerable] Stack on all allies and inflict [Laceration] and [Laceration] Count against all enemies

dataList.name: Harmonics+
dataList.desc:
When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (<style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> times per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Reduce [Vulnerable] Stack on all allies and inflict [Laceration] and [Laceration] Count against all enemies

dataList.name: Harmonics++
dataList.desc:
When an ally or an enemy dies in a turn, all units gain <style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> [Vulnerable] next turn (once per Wave)
- On ally Clash Win in the same turn where all units gained [Vulnerable] due to the above effect, all allies lose 1 [Vulnerable] and inflict 4 [Laceration] and +2 [Laceration] Count against all enemies (<style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> times per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Reduce [Vulnerable] Stack on all allies and inflict [Laceration] and [Laceration] Count against all enemies

dataList.name: Walking Bass
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #3 Deployed Identity]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and 1 random ally
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to 50%

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Apply [TensionUp] to self and 1 random ally

dataList.name: Walking Bass+
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #3, #<style="upgradeHighlight">4</style> Deployed Identities]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and 1 random ally
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to <style="upgradeHighlight">75</style>%

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Apply [TensionUp] to self and 1 random ally

dataList.name: Walking Bass++
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> random allies
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to <style="upgradeHighlight">100</style>%

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Apply [TensionUp] to self and 2 random allies

dataList.name: Pink Petals
dataList.desc:
On Hit by an ally with a Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', inflict 1 [PinkPetals]
- Inflict 1 additional [PinkPetals] for every 5 [Sinking] on the enemy (max 4)

dataList.name: Pink Bouquet
dataList.desc:
On Hit with a Pierce Skill against an enemy: Gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (2 times per turn per Identity)
- On enemy Kill with the said Skill: gain 1 additional [Agility] and 2 additional [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (once per turn per Identity)

On Hit by an ally with a Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking', inflict 2 [PinkPetals]
- Inflict 1 additional [PinkPetals] for every 5 [Sinking] on the enemy (max 4)
- If the enemy has 10+ [PinkPetals] Stack, inflict 2 [Vibration] On Hit (3 times per turn)

Turn End: Inflict 2 [Binding] and 3 [DefenseDown] next turn against enemies(for Abnormalities, Parts) with 5+ ([Sinking] + [Vibration])
- If target has 10+ ([Sinking] + [Vibration]), inflict 2 [Binding], 1 [Paralysis], and 4 [DefenseDown] instead

Turn End: If all enemies have remaining [PinkPetals] Stack, all allies gain 1 [Enhancement] next turn

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Inflict [PinkPetals]. Inflict [Vibration] when conditions are met
Inflict [Binding] and [DefenseDown] next turn. Inflict [Binding], [Paralysis], and [DefenseDown] when conditions are met

dataList.name: Royal Jelly Perfume
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #6 Deployed Identity]

Encounter Start: Gain [QueenBeepheromone]

Take -15% damage from enemies with [Combustion]

Turn End: Inflict [QueenBeeMark] next turn against the enemy(in Focused Encounters, the Part) that dealt the most damage to this unit
- If allies did not take any damage from enemies, inflict [QueenBeeMark] next turn against 1 random enemy(in Focused Encounters, a Part)

dataList.name: Still-warm Coffee
dataList.desc:
[Effects apply only to #1 Deployed Identity]

Turn End after using an Attack Skill: Heal 5 SP
- Then, if the affected unit is at max HP and is a Lobotomy Corp. Identity, gain 1 [PlusCoinValueUp] next turn

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Heal SP; gain [PlusCoinValueUp] next turn if conditions are met
